summary: Data Module Testing Complete - All 5 pages work (Warehouses, Counterparties, Items, Prices, Turnover). Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All pages render, CRUD modals work, DataTable features verified. Fixed a SelectItem empty value bug in DataTable filter panel.

critical.issue: DuplicateKeyError when creating counterparty with null EIK - MongoDB unique index on (org_id, eik) fails when multiple counterparties have null EIK. Returns 500 instead of handling gracefully.
critical.root_cause: Unique index on counterparties collection with sparse=false causes constraint violation for null EIK values. Either make index sparse or handle null EIK differently.
critical.error_log: pymongo.errors.DuplicateKeyError: E11000 duplicate key error collection: test_database.counterparties index: org_id_1_eik_1

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - add DialogDescription for accessibility

backend: GET /api/items - list items with pagination format
frontend: Sidebar 'Данни' section expands correctly showing 5 sub-pages
Navigation to /data/warehouses - page loads with DataTable
Navigation to /data/counterparties - page loads with DataTable
Navigation to /data/items - page loads with DataTable
Navigation to /data/prices - page loads with DataTable (read-only)
Navigation to /data/turnover - page loads with grand totals cards
DataTable pagination shows 'Показва X-Y от Z'
Create warehouse modal opens with fields (Код, Тип, Име, Адрес, Бележки, Активен)
Create counterparty modal opens with fields (Име, Тип, EIK, ДДС, etc)
Create item modal opens with fields (SKU, Мярка, Име, Категория, etc)
Turnover page shows grand totals (45 invoices, 7025.00 net, 8430.00 total)

action_items: FIX: POST /api/counterparties returns 500 when EIK is null/empty due to unique index - either make the MongoDB index sparse (sparse: true) or exclude null values from uniqueness check
MINOR: Add DialogDescription to modal dialogs for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: Backend counterparties route has no error handling for duplicate key constraint on null EIK values
Counterparties unique index org_id_1_eik_1 needs sparse:true option to allow multiple null EIK values
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/DataTable.js - Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in bool filter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data module is fully functional except for counterparty creation with null EIK. Backend tests in test_data_module.py cover Items CRUD, filtering, pagination, Counterparties list, Warehouses list, Prices endpoint, Turnover reports. Frontend DataTable filter panel had a bug with empty SelectItem value which was fixed. All 5 data pages (Warehouses, Counterparties, Items, Prices, Turnover) render correctly in Bulgarian. Turnover page shows grand totals cards with 45 invoices totaling 8430.00 лв.
